context: Expense reimbursement policy for Margaret Farmer Practice, LLC covering studio materials, travel between Kyoto and gallery partners, and exhibition costs.

validation_rules.notes: Itemized receipt required for all studio material purchases such as clay, glaze chemicals, and kiln fuel.
validation_rules.requirement: Receipt attached and expense under 50000 JPY

validation_rules.notes: Travel to gallery partners in Kyoto, Paris, or for the Kyoto Craft Museum commission requires prior written approval from the owner.
Personal purchases not related to ceramics practice are not reimbursable.
